geologyCoverage.message: 地质模型平面范围覆盖围护结构和施工影响区。

wallEmbedmentPreflight.method: common wall-toe search using the existing Rankine net-passive moment screening
wallEmbedmentPreflight.message: 当前墙趾标高满足嵌固稳定筛查，无需调整。

strengthDesignLoop.loadPathPolicy: replacement slab/waler elevations remain in vertical tributary-band partition during support removal stages
strengthDesignLoop.waleBoundaryPolicy: closed-perimeter rigid corner joints restrain face-wale end bays; direct strut reactions retain conservative qL equilibrium

wallEmbedment.message: 当前墙趾标高满足嵌固稳定筛查，无需调整。

calculationDiagnostics.professionalBoundary: 自动诊断用于定位计算链路、支撑拓扑和构件控制项；新增支撑及计算结果仍需岩土、结构和施工专业复核。

result.note: 该候选已使用完整计算链路复算：施工工况、支撑轴力、墙体位移/内力、围檩内力、稳定性、IFC 兼容性和正式化闸门。

waleSupportBayRepair.action: 围檩支点间距诊断在 2 个墙面发现超限，移除 6 根旧版墙—支撑短撑，自动增补 6 根直接墙—墙 V 形/角撑；最大支点间距由 11.0m 降至 5.78m。
